Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class Account

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.Account
public class Account extends SObject

Java class for Account complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Account">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AccountCleanInfos" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
